message:
Command `
# Confirm the config.json has the right skip settings and the previous fixes
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json | python3 -m json.tool | grep -E "SKIP|skip" | head -10
echo "==="
# Confirm how big the DEF file is from step 67 (should be full routed DEF)
ls -lh /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/` executed with exit code 0.
